title: PrototypePipelineConfig
description: Configuration for a prototype pipeline run

working_dir.description: Absolute path to the run working directory. All agent file operations are scoped to this directory.

brief_path.description: Path to brief file, relative to working_dir (brief.md or brief.txt)

seed_path.description: Absolute path to Ouroboros seed YAML file

seed_metadata.description: Metadata extracted from seed file (populated by pipeline-intake-agent)

framework.description: SPA framework for the generated prototype

lo_fi_enabled.description: When true, lo-fi-wireframe-builder runs and gates the SPA stage

lo_fi_gate.description: When true and lo_fi_enabled, a human review gate pauses before SPA generation

token_file_path.description: Path to design token file, relative to working_dir. Supported: CSS custom properties, JSON token file.
